issue_candidates.why_it_might_matter: Client alleges two denials of access under existing order.
Intentional violation of court order may support enforcement/contempt analysis.
Opposing party cited support arrears as reason for denial.
Mother claims child does not want to go.
Repeated denial may implicate custody modification, but client currently asks enforcement.
Urgent relief may be considered if safety or immediate harm exists.
Family cases may involve safety concerns, but none are reported.
Texts and order may support filing, but authentication and full context matter.
Support matter may affect strategy but not access obligation.
